title: codereview pass 1: announce.rs error handling
description: Review of error variant addition for InvalidChannel. Focus: completeness of Display/Error impls, consistency with other modules like loadng.rs:46
close_reason: Fixed announce.rs error handling by removing dead NotSigned/HopCountExceeded variants and updating Display impl after 3 independent codereview passes (test, clippy, fmt all clean with no P0-P2 findings). All codereview beads fixed and closed.
